title: Slice B: Hook Wiring — Policy/Hook/CI Hardening
acceptance_criteria: AC1: settings.json has no git rev-parse or $PWD; all $HOME-anchored
AC2: PostToolUse * block points to check-errors.sh
AC3: backlog-check.sh calls backlog_match.py; exits non-zero when no match
AC4: check-errors.sh calls fail_fast_state.py check and record
AC7: $HOME-anchored paths resolve correctly regardless of CWD
